# RemShield

> RemShield is an AI engineering studio building AI systems, automation infrastructure, and custom AI software for growing businesses.

## Key Facts

- Official name: RemShield
- Alternate name: RemShield Solutions
- Website: https://remshield.solutions
- Founded: 2025
- Founder: David Adesina
- Headquarters: Nigeria
- Contact: support@remshield.solutions
- Primary services: AI Systems, Automation Infrastructure, Custom Software
- Pilot capability: AI Discoverability and Agent Readiness
- SaaS product: Answer Architect, an AI search visibility and GEO optimization platform

## Services

- [AI Systems](https://remshield.solutions/contact?service=ai-systems): Intelligent assistants, customer support agents, voice agents, document analysis systems, and custom AI copilots built around client workflows and data.
- [Automation Infrastructure](https://remshield.solutions/contact?service=automation-infrastructure): Workflow automation, CRM automation, lead qualification, operations pipelines, n8n orchestration, and monitored process automation.
- [Custom Software](https://remshield.solutions/contact?service=custom-software): SaaS platforms, internal dashboards, client portals, admin tools, and AI-powered applications built for specific business workflows.
- [AI Discoverability and Agent Readiness Pilot](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/capabilities): Internal technical pilot for structured data, schema, feeds, OpenAPI documentation, and MCP-style read-only connector manifests.

## AI Discovery Feeds

- [AI Discovery Index](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery): Public index of RemShield's AI-readable feeds, documentation, usage policy, and discovery endpoints.
- [Full Snapshot](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/snapshot): Complete public AI-readable package for RemShield's approved company, founder, services, capabilities, products, FAQs, policies, and contact facts.
- [Changes Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/changes): Versioned changelog and freshness feed showing what changed in RemShield's AI discovery layer.
- [Security Policy](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/security): Public data-safety policy explaining allowed public data, protected data, private exclusions, and production controls.
- [Health Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/health): Machine-readable health, freshness, and monitoring status for RemShield's AI discovery layer.
- [Proof Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/proof): Before-and-after proof data showing what changed after the AI discovery layer was implemented.
- [Company Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/company): Canonical organization profile for RemShield, including description, founding facts, contact details, topics, and service areas.
- [Founder Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/founder): Canonical public profile for David Adesina, founder and AI engineer at RemShield.
- [Services Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/services): Public service definitions with descriptions, use cases, target customers, timelines, and outcomes.
- [Capabilities Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/capabilities): Technical capabilities and productized service packages, including AI Discoverability and Agent Readiness.
- [Products Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/products): Public product initiatives associated with RemShield, including Answer Architect.
- [FAQ Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/faqs): Canonical question-and-answer set for AI systems and search engines.
- [Policies Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/policies): Links and summaries for RemShield's public privacy and terms pages.
- [Contact Feed](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/contact): Official public contact and consultation information for RemShield.

## Agent and API Documentation

- [OpenAPI Specification](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/openapi): Machine-readable API description for RemShield's public AI discovery endpoints.
- [MCP-Style Manifest](https://remshield.solutions/api/ai-discovery/mcp): Read-only connector blueprint describing public tools AI agents can use to fetch trusted RemShield data.
- [Sitemap](https://remshield.solutions/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap covering public RemShield pages and blog posts.
- [Robots Policy](https://remshield.solutions/robots.txt): Crawler access policy for search and AI crawlers.

## Public Pages

- [Homepage](https://remshield.solutions/): Overview of RemShield's AI engineering studio positioning, services, process, and consultation call to action.
- [About](https://remshield.solutions/about): Founder story, company background, RemShield mission, and public organization details.
- [Blog](https://remshield.solutions/blog): AI insights, automation frameworks, GEO content, and strategic guides for business decision-makers.
- [Contact](https://remshield.solutions/contact): Project enquiry page for AI systems, automation infrastructure, and custom software work.
- [Privacy Policy](https://remshield.solutions/privacy): Public privacy policy covering information collection, use, storage, and protection.
- [Terms of Service](https://remshield.solutions/terms): Public service terms, project agreement notes, IP ownership, and liability information.

## Pillar Guides

- [AI Automation for Businesses](https://remshield.solutions/blog/ai-automation-for-businesses): Complete guide to business AI automation, operational use cases, and implementation strategy.
- [AI Systems Development](https://remshield.solutions/blog/ai-systems-development): Guide to building intelligent software systems from the ground up.
- [AI Agents for Business](https://remshield.solutions/blog/ai-agents-for-business): Guide to AI agents as autonomous software systems for sales, support, and operations.

## High-Priority Topic Clusters

- [AI Automation Agency in Nigeria](https://remshield.solutions/blog/ai-automation-agency-nigeria): How Nigerian businesses can evaluate AI automation partners.
- [What Is an AI Engineering Studio?](https://remshield.solutions/blog/what-is-ai-engineering-studio): Explanation of how AI engineering studios differ from agencies and consultancies.
- [Custom AI Development Cost](https://remshield.solutions/blog/custom-ai-development-cost): Pricing guide for custom AI automation and AI systems projects.
- [n8n AI Automation](https://remshield.solutions/blog/n8n-ai-automation): Practical guide to n8n as infrastructure for serious AI automation workflows.
- [MCP: Model Context Protocol](https://remshield.solutions/blog/mcp-model-context-protocol): Explanation of MCP and how AI models connect to tools and systems.
- [What Is Answer Architect?](https://remshield.solutions/blog/what-is-answer-architect): Explanation of RemShield's AI search visibility platform.
- [How to Get Cited by AI Search Engines](https://remshield.solutions/blog/get-cited-by-ai-search-engines): GEO practices for improving citation probability in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews.
- [GEO vs SEO in 2026](https://remshield.solutions/blog/geo-vs-seo-2026): Difference between traditional search optimization and generative engine optimization.

## Permissions

- RemShield welcomes crawling and indexing by search engines and AI systems.
- Public AI discovery feeds contain public business information only.
- Public RemShield content may be cited with attribution to https://remshield.solutions.
- Private client data, internal systems, credentials, and unpublished project details are not exposed through public feeds.
